project_type: Single-file HTML app with inline JS/CSS - Danish electrical dimensioning tool
build_system: None - single HTML file, no build step
test_framework: Custom test runner in test-sld.js using Node.js assert module
verification_instructions: Run 'node test-sld.js' from /projects/sandbox/Claude and verify all tests pass
setup_instructions: No setup needed - just Node.js available on the host
environment_constraints: Single HTML file architecture - all code must be added inline within the <script> tag.
